description: Generate a DiffDock batch-input CSV template with the required columns (complex_name, protein_path, ligand_description, protein_sequence) and example protein-ligand rows.
rules: writes a single template CSV to record_store
NUM_EXAMPLES controls how many example rows (default 3, max 3 distinct examples)
requires pandas; degrades to an empty artifact if pandas is absent
limitation: Produces a template only — it does not dock anything. Example SMILES/sequences are placeholders to be replaced with real data.
